name: generation-time trace records every pattern_id referenced during a generation event
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","patterns_referenced":["p1","p2"]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1"' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p2"' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
